title: Wood (magazine)
body: Wood is a magazine catering to the home and hobby woodworker with offices are in Des Moines, Iowa, US. It claims more than 350,000 subscribers. It publishes seven regular issues annually (December/January, March, May, July, September, October, and November). It has the highest circulation of any woodworking magazine in the world. The magazine is owned by People Inc.
categories: Articles needing additional references from September 2018
